revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''6-8-010

The total energy absorbed, including losses, by a device in a given time.


Note:  The term power consumption refers to the power taken, including losses, by a device.

{{IALAFooter}}
